form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Wanganui Straight to win by 1.3 lengths in 17.17, beating Grasscutter Moe. Last start finished 4th on April 14 over 457m at Manawatu behind Need An Uber beaten 3.5 lengths (26.17) in a Class 5. Hard to entertain this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when eighth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked entering second bend, lost ground.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (30.58) over 520m at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Hasn't been far away recently and can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Class 5 H on April 10 over 520m at this track behind Opawa Fannin beaten 8 lengths (30.62). Can atone this time.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Manawatu (26.16) in a Class 5, finishing a 3.5 lengths third. Goes very well off the draw boasting three wins and two places from seven starts. The recent effort suggests he is a genuine hope.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (26.15) over 457m at Manawatu. Drawn wide. Cannot enthuse despite that better recent effort.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths third at this track but did record a sharp 30.20 over the 520m journey. Faces a tough assignment this time.

form.formComment: Returns from a five months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing second over 457m at Manawatu. Did have a solo trial (17.44) on this track over 305m. Has claims with the right run.
